Name: EASTMAN Demolition Hammer 11kg 1500W Concrete Breaker 21J Impact Energy 900 1890 BPM BMC Box Free Pointed Bit

Complete Heavy-Duty Kit: Supplied in a rugged BMC Box for protection and includes a Free Carbon Set and Pointed Bit for immediate operation. Robust 11kg Design: With a net weight of 11.35 kg, this machine offers the stability and downward force required for serious industrial demolition tasks. › See more product details
